artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
removed_or_excluded_refs: Add [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] a short Python script (pandas) that reads [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] (or the embedded packet JSON), re-computes yield_margin_pp and impurity_margin_pp, re-evaluates yield_rule_eval and impurity_rule_eval using strict inequalities, and writes a regenerated CSV and a simple numeric diff against the provided CSV.

Add [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] exact commands to run the script and any dependencies (example: python -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install pandas && .venv/bin/python reproduce_QC.py), and commands used to compute hashes (shasum -a 256).

Add an explicit reproducibility snippet (e.g., a small Python script or a one-liner pandas command) that reads the embedded packet (or the CSV) and reproduces the computed columns (yield_margin_pp, impurity_margin_pp, yield_rule_eval, impurity_rule_eval, qc_decision). Save this as [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] and reference it in the report.

Produce [REDACTED_INTERNAL_ATTEMPT_ID] that preserves the current CSV and report content but appends: (1) a reproducibility script ([EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]) and a short README with exact commands to run it, (2) explicit numeric rounding and uncertainty-propagation documentation in the report, and (3) a short note fixing/clarifying any metadata summary inconsistencies.
Run reproduce_QC.py and confirm generated CSV matches [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] exactly (byte-for-byte) or document and explain any intended differences.

The grader's claims about CSV contents are supported by the artifact content previews (attempts/revised/[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]) and stdout preview. Packet values (Run1/Run2/Run3) and applied rule (yield > 70 and impurity < 10) are present in the trace and CSV preview.
